ddls:
CREATE TABLE "process_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the process element */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process element */,
  "process_stage" TEXT /* Process stage of the element */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Equipment ID associated with the process element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of unit (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "parameter_category" TEXT /* Category of the parameter (e.g., input, output) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process element */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "process_conditions" TEXT /* Additional process conditions */,
  "equipment_status" TEXT /* Equipment status */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who recorded the data */,
  "mpsp" REAL /* Material price per kilogram */,
  "total_product_yield" REAL /* Total product yield in millions of kilograms per year */,
  "total_capital_investment" REAL /* Total capital investment in millions of dollars */,
  "annual_operating_cost" REAL /* Annual operating cost in millions of dollars per year */,
  "total_gwp" REAL /* Total global warming potential in kilograms of CO2 equivalent per kilogram */,
  "total_fec" REAL /* Total fossil energy consumption in megajoules per kilogram */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_data_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES process_elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_data_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process element */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "price_per_kg" REAL /* Price per kilogram of the material */,
  "material_supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the material */,
  "price_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the material price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_prices_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES process_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capital_investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment entry */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process element */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount of capital investment in millions of dollars */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the capital investment */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of capital investment (e.g., equipment, infrastructure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capital_investments_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES process_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process element */,
  "annual_cost" REAL /* Annual operating cost in millions of dollars */,
  "cost_category" TEXT /* Category of the operating cost (e.g., labor, energy, maintenance) */,
  "cost_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the operating cost (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operating_costs_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES process_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_impacts" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental impact entry */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process element */,
  "gwp" REAL /* Global warming potential in kilograms of CO2 equivalent per kilogram */,
  "fec" REAL /* Fossil energy consumption in megajoules per kilogram */,
  "impact_category" TEXT /* Category of the environmental impact (e.g., greenhouse gas emissions, water usage) */,
  "impact_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the environmental impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_impacts_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES process_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_yields" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield entry */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process element */,
  "yield_amount" REAL /* Total product yield in millions of kilograms per year */,
  "product_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the product */,
  "product_destination" TEXT /* Destination of the product (e.g., storage, shipping) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_yields_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES process_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process element being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the process element */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the process element was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES process_elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
